📚 Free Online Curriculum

The Future of Product Marketing

The Practitioner's Guide to the Agentic Era

10x Yourself in the Agentic Era

This free curriculum teaches you how to transform your PMM practice using AI agents. Each chapter includes a summary, downloadable deck, PDF whitepaper, and comprehension quiz.

13
Chapters
~60K
Words
Free
Forever

Course Curriculum

Part I: The Ground Shifted
1

Your Buyer Just Hired an Agent

The agent-mediated buyer journey and the Visibility Gap. Why most PMM content is invisible to AI.

✓ Available
2

The Gartner Moment

37 PMM activities evaluated against AI replaceability. The Activity Matrix and what to automate, watch, or double down on.

✓ Available
3

The Six Percent Problem

Why most PMM organizations are failing at AI integration — even the ones that bought the tools.

✓ Available
Part II: Deconstructing the PMM Job
4

The Full Stack PMM

What separates the PMMs who compound from the ones who just keep up. Deep specialist + AI-extended reach.

✓ Available
5

Why Stories Still Win

The PMM skill AI cannot replicate: narrative architecture, story quality spectrum, and the resonance test.

✓ Available
6

Competitive Intelligence as a Living System

The quarterly battlecard is dead. Build a living CI architecture with continuous signal monitoring and the BattleCoach Flywheel.

✓ Available
7

The Demo Stack

Match the tool to the moment. Three-tier landscape, decision matrix, and the Demo Asset Pyramid.

✓ Available
8

Pricing, Packaging, and the Consumption Shift

The per-seat model is breaking. Three pricing models, the Intelligence Pipeline, and the Practitioner's Playbook.

✓ Available
9

Launch Management at Machine Speed

Automate the 80% that's operational. Invest in the 20% that turns announcements into market moments.

✓ Available
10

Analyst Relations and the Influence Layer

From AR manager to influence architect. Four layers of influence, RFI automation, and the multiplier effect.

✓ Available
11

The PMM Tech Stack: A Practitioner's Evaluation

Three tools cover 70%. Build vs buy, team size recommendations, and the stack evaluation framework.

✓ Available
Part III: Building the Future
12

Skills That Survive: What AI Can't Touch (Yet)

The four durable PMM skills: strategic judgment, organizational intelligence, narrative craft, and customer empathy.

✓ Available
13

Team Structure and Hiring for the Agentic Org

From role-based to outcome-based teams. The full-stack PMM and hiring architects, not builders.

✓ Available

Start with Chapter 1

Learn why the buyer journey you optimized for no longer exists — and what to do about it.
